flavor.description: Dusk says almost nothing. He watches. Trained by the Sessiz Suikast (Seh-SEEZ Swee-KAHST) — the Silent Assassins of the Red Desert — he treats killing as craft. In combat he is fast, efficient, no wasted motion.

additionalAbilities.name: Sneak Attack (Assassin)
additionalAbilities.description: Once per turn, Dusk deals an extra 14 (4d6) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of Dusk that isn't incapacitated and Dusk doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

additionalAbilities.name: Cunning Action
additionalAbilities.description: As a bonus action: Dash, Disengage, or Hide

additionalAbilities.name: Assassinate
additionalAbilities.description: During its first turn, Dusk has advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasn't taken a turn. Any hit Dusk scores against a surprised creature is a critical hit.

additionalAbilities.name: The Economy
additionalAbilities.description:
Dusk never boasts. He never performs. The Crown cannot feed on him via Sycophant's Praise. He has
trained everything unnecessary out of his combat presence. He is always exactly where he needs to be.

additionalAbilities.name: Sessiz Suikast Training
additionalAbilities.description: The Silent Assassins of the Red Desert trained Dusk to treat killing as craft. No wasted motion. No unnecessary violence. No chatter. In combat this reads as eerie competence

actions.name: Twin Daggers
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Cunning Action - Disengage (Bonus Action)
actions.description:
Move away without provoking opportunity attacks. He uses this constantly — repositioning is how he
controls space.

actions.name: Cunning Action — Hide (Bonus Action)
actions.description: Make a Stealth check to disappear. Used after attacking to become harder to target. Track: !i effect Dusk "Hidden" -dur 1
